title: RNA sequencing data for bleomycin exposed THP-1 macrophages
author: Morikka, Jack
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains normalized counts matrices, from dds_deseq objects, from DeSeq2 analysis of RNA sequencing data, from THP-1 macrophages exposed to multiple doses of bleomycin in the range of 0-100µg/ml for 24H, 48H or 72H.
steps_raw: This dataset contains normalized counts matrices, from dds_deseq objects, from DeSeq2 analysis of RNA sequencing data, from THP-1 macrophages exposed to multiple doses of bleomycin in the range of 0-100µg/ml for 24H, 48H or 72H.
